title: Labor-Market Research, Role Families, and Data Limits · Hiring Decision Lens: Posting Demand
summary: A candidate follows viral title and salary lists that mix countries, seniority, occupations, posting windows, and unsupported predictions. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the posting demand increment in dated labor-market evidence brief. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Interpret posting-frequency signals as bounded demand evidence rather than required-skill, hiring-probability, or future-certainty claims.
Record source owner, geography, population, collection period, update date, method, and missing groups before using labor data.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Posting Demand · Theory Posting Demand
steps.instruction:
theory case — A viral salary post combines national medians, remote listings, senior titles, old data, and one technology trend into a guaranteed entry-level forecast. The theory variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Posting Demand contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Posting Demand · Theory Posting Demand.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for interpret posting-frequency signals as bounded demand evidence rather than required-skill, hiring-probability, or future-certainty claims. For Predict Posting Demand · Theory Posting Demand, keep Posting Demand connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A viral salary post combines national medians, remote listings, senior titles, old data, and one technology trend into a guaranteed entry-level forecast. The theory variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Posting Demand condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: GitHub Profile Documentation — Controls profile visibility, optional public identity, pinned work, contribution context, and the personal safety consequences of public disclosure.

hints: For Predict Posting Demand · Theory Posting Demand, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Posting Demand precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Predict Posting Demand · Theory Posting Demand, trace this concrete input and predict targeting, source, evidence, contribution, access, privacy, consent, process, decision, rejection, repair, follow-up, and learner-controlled transfer evidence before reviewing it: A viral salary post combines national medians, remote listings, senior titles, old data, and one technology trend into a guaranteed entry-level forecast. The theory variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

For Predict Posting Demand · Theory Posting Demand, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: The most-mentioned technology is mandatory for every candidate.

options.text: Interpret posting-frequency signals as bounded demand evidence rather than required-skill, hiring-probability, or future-certainty claims. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.
The most-mentioned technology is mandatory for every candidate. That claim fails the predict posting demand evidence boundary for Posting Demand.

For predict posting demand, apply Posting Demand without its stated preconditions, omit the dated labor-market evidence brief trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Posting Demand for dated labor-market evidence brief.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Posting Demand while producing dated labor-market evidence brief.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A viral salary post combines national medians, remote listings, senior titles, old data, and one technology trend into a guaranteed entry-level forecast. The worked example variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Interpret posting-frequency signals as bounded demand evidence rather than required-skill, hiring-probability, or future-certainty claims. A defensible solution applies Posting Demand, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to dated labor-market evidence brief.

content.code:
# Worked focus: career-posting-demand — Interpret posting-frequency signals as bounded demand evidence rather than required-skill, hiring-probability, or future-certainty claims.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-2
focus: career-posting-demand
decision-evidence: Interpret posting-frequency signals as bounded demand evidence rather than required-skill, hiring-probability, or future-certainty claims.
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.
